title: Count the Number of Good Partitions
titleCn: 统计好分割方案的数目

testcases.input: nums = [1,1,1,1] Output: 1 Explanation: The only possible good partition is: ([1,1,1,1]).
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The only possible good partition is: ([1,1,1,1]).

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,1,3] Output: 2 Explanation: The 2 possible good partitions are: ([1,2,1], [3]) and ([1,2,1,3]).
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The 2 possible good partitions are: ([1,2,1], [3]) and ([1,2,1,3]).
